problem id: b72f6f48
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) XOR NOT SHL(6)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  00110101 -> 11111110
  00000100 -> 10111111
  10101011 -> 11010101
  01100111 -> 01111011
  00001010 -> 11011111
  01000010 -> 01111011
  01001110 -> 10111111
  00001101 -> 01101111

query: 10001110
predicted answer: 11010111
